creator: z_axis@163.com
text:
1. Is this with editors/emacs or editors/emacs-devel?
2. What does `pkg info emacs` say (assuming you installed the package for editors/emacs)?
$ pkg info emacs-nox11
emacs-nox11-25.3_1,3
Name           : emacs-nox11
Version        : 25.3_1,3
Installed on   : Wed Dec 27 08:56:15 2017 UTC
Origin         : editors/emacs-nox11
Architecture   : FreeBSD:11:amd64
Prefix         : /usr/local
...

3. When you start with `emacs -q`, and evaluate (read-passwd "password: ") do you see the save behaviour?
It works normally.

Regards!
